properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You could have stepped into creation With fire for all to see Brought every tribe and nation to their knees Arriving with the host of heaven In royal robe and crown The rulers of the earth all bowing down

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But You chose meekness over majesty Wrapped Your power in humanity

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Glory be to You alone King who reigns from a manger throne My life, my praise, everything I own To Jesus the King on a manger throne

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You could have marched in all Your glory Into the heart of Rome Showed them splendor like they'd never known But You wrote a better story In humble Bethlehem Creator in the arms of common men

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You will die for our redemption And You'll rise so we can live

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: From heaven to the cradle From cradle to the cross Let heaven and nature sing This is our King But the grave couldn't hold Him Our God has overcome Let Heaven and nature sing This is our King

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: All hail the King All hail the King All hail the King

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Glory be to You alone King who reigns from a manger throne My life, my praise, everything I own To Jesus the King on a manger throne My life, my praise, everything I own To Jesus the King on a manger throne To Jesus the King on a manger throne
